---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new primitive, animation, or library capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One sentence describing what you want.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed API

Show what calling this feature would look like from a user's perspective:

```python
# example usage
from handanim import ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Links, references, screenshots, or comparable features in other tools (Manim, RoughJS, etc.).
